featureName: Synthesis Persistence And Health Are Not Truthful
statusReason: Planning packet initialized from interpreted operator input. No local scheduler/SQL/health reproduction, implementation, test, certification, production mutation, commit, push, or deployment is claimed.

requirementsRecovery.decision: Synthesis derives from and persists into the single operator-owned global corpus through explicit role/grant access and makes no tenant/user row-isolation claim.

scopeProgress.name: Canonical Read Health Alert And API Truth
Today Status UI And Real-Stack Regression

executionHistory.summary: Reconciled the UX-owned durable-synthesis contract across Today and operator Status surfaces, with shared primitives, persistence-derived state exclusivity, citation privacy, retry mutation feedback, filtered run-history behavior, responsive and accessible interaction rules, real-stack Playwright-visible outcomes, and routed design questions. No implementation, persistence, scheduler, alert, browser or test execution, evidence, certification, status transition, commit, push, build, or deployment is claimed.

Replaced the placeholder technical design with a code-grounded durable synthesis architecture: deterministic logical runs, daily/weekly producers, atomic PostgreSQL persistence, normalized citations, durable attempts and retries, canonical reader/health models, truthful never-run/stale/partial/failed states, operator APIs, privacy-safe observability, and non-destructive migration/rollback. No spec, scope, report, user validation, scenario manifest, source, test, certification, commit, push, build, or deployment change is claimed.

Reconciled SR-006/GRILL-12: Synthesis derives from and persists into the single operator-owned global corpus, uses explicit role/grant reads, forbids ungranted private-content/existence disclosure, and makes no tenant/user row-isolation claim. Preserved SCN-004-004-01..10. No source, test, design, scope, report, user validation, certification, commit, push, or deployment work is claimed.

Reconciled design.md for SR-003, SR-006, GRILL-08, GRILL-12 and the requested migration/rollback/fault concerns. Source-set fingerprints now identify idempotent input while an actor/cadence/window advisory transaction lock serializes same-window work; same-source replay appends an idempotent attempt, changed-source reruns append a new run/output and supersede-before-insert under the unique-current invariant, crash rollback preserves the prior current aggregate, schema/citations/source authorization validate before commit, and immutable run events preserve history. Migration allocation is symbolic until implementation merge-wave rebase; two-wave expand-contract keeps an eligible previous release readable and fail-closed, with automated write freeze plus proven backup/restore for exceptional data rollback. Health is never green for never-run, stale, partial, failed, probe-error, unreadable, or stale-cache states. Seven isolated no-interception fault profiles and first-slice auth/privacy/error/observability gates are defined. Focused artifact lint passed. No spec, scope, report, user validation, scenario manifest, source, test, config, certification, status transition, commit, push, build, deployment, or spec 079 change is claimed.

spec-scope-hardening reconciliation of planning artifacts against the 2026-07-24T05:46Z spec.md/design.md revision. Verified design.md covers BOTH named concerns: transactional synthesis persistence (single serializable pgx.Tx, one-current partial index, mandatory post-commit read-back gate, atomic rollback) AND migration safety (two-wave expand-contract keeping the accepted previous release readable via a compatibility projection, code-only previous-release rollback, plus an automated write-freeze + proven backup/restore data-rollback contract) — no design gap on that concern. Reconciled scenario-manifest.json to 18 rows (one per Gherkin (scenarioId,scope) instance across SCOPE-01..05, empty linkedTests pending implementation) to clear G057/G059; added SCN-id-cited faithful Core Outcome DoD items to all five scopes to clear G068; expanded certification.scopeProgress from 1 to 5 scopes with correct names and dependency ordering. No spec, design, source, test, config, certification, status transition, commit, push, build, deployment, or spec 079 change is claimed. Residual: traceability-guard report-evidence checks remain implementation-pending (report.md correctly claims no test evidence at planning time); not fabricated.
